# freeipa_dns_zone (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA DNS Zones.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `zone_name` (String) The name of the DNS zone.

### Optional

- `admin_email` (String) Administrator e-mail address (idnssoamailaddr).
- `allow_query` (String) Semicolon-separated list of IP addresses or networks allowed to issue queries (idnsallowquery).
- `allow_sync_ptr` (Boolean) Allow synchronization of forward and reverse records (idnsallowsyncptr).
- `allow_transfer` (String) Semicolon-separated list of IP addresses or networks allowed to transfer the zone (idnsallowtransfer).
- `authoritative_nameserver` (String) Authoritative nameserver (idnssoamname).
- `default_ttl` (Number) Default time to live for records without an explicit TTL (idnsdefaultttl).
- `dynamic_update` (Boolean) Allow dynamic updates (idnsdynamicupdate).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the DNS zone is enabled/active.
- `expire` (Number) SOA record expire time (idnssoaexpire).
- `force` (Boolean) Force zone creation.
- `forward_policy` (String) Forwarding policy: only, first, none (idnsforwardpolicy).
- `forwarders` (Set of String) List of DNS forwarders (idnsforwarders).
- `minimum` (Number) How long negative responses should be cached (idnssoaminttl).
- `refresh` (Number) SOA record refresh time (idnssoarefresh).
- `retry` (Number) SOA record retry time (idnssoaretry).
- `skip_nameserver_check` (Boolean) Force DNS zone creation even if the nameserver is not resolvable.
- `skip_overlap_check` (Boolean) Force DNS zone creation even if it overlaps with an existing zone.
- `ttl` (Number) Time to live for records at the zone apex (dnsttl).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique zone name.
